caption: A screen recording shows a browser window displaying a conceptual map on a black background with various interconnected circular icons and text labels. The map features nodes with text such as "Intention," "Knowledge," "Interconnectivity," and "Insight," linked by blue lines. A small inset video in the upper right corner shows a man wearing a black baseball cap and a dark shirt, looking toward the screen. The browser tabs at the top list titles including "Trust & Learning by Systemic," "Future of Society by Systemic," and "Insights -> Introduction to Rumi." The URL in the address bar begins with "blackboard.uul.learning." Throughout the sequence, the screen remains static, with the conceptual map and the man in the inset video remaining in the same positions, though there are slight shifts in the man's facial expression as he observes the display.
